# Bighorn Threads

> Custom workwear, branded apparel, and promotional products for Las Vegas construction crews and trade businesses. Local production, in-house screen printing and embroidery, expertise in FR-rated (NFPA 2112, NFPA 70E) and hi-vis (ANSI/ISEA 107) compliance, and a SAGE-catalog promo product program.

Operated by VP Promos LLC, d/b/a Bighorn Threads. Located in Las Vegas, Nevada. Service area covers Las Vegas, Henderson, North Las Vegas, Summerlin, Spring Valley, Boulder City, and Paradise. Phone: 702-904-8923. Website: https://bighornthreads.com

The company specializes in branded apparel programs for trades — embroidered polos for service techs, FR shirts and leather over-layers for welders, ANSI 107 hi-vis vests for road and night-shift crews, branded hard hats for general construction and electrical trades, and full-uniform programs for ongoing client relationships. Decoration methods include embroidery, screen printing, DTF (direct-to-film), laser engraving, and pad printing — chosen to fit the substrate and order volume.

## High-intent product and service pages

- [Custom Hard Hats Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/custom-hard-hats-las-vegas/): ANSI/ISEA Z89.1-certified hard hats from MSA, Honeywell, Bullard, 3M, and Pyramex, branded with manufacturer-approved vinyl decals on front, back, and sides. Type I and Type II options, Class E for electrical work up to 20,000V, Class G for general use.
- [Custom Polo Shirts Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/custom-polo-shirts-las-vegas/): Embroidered company polos in Port Authority K500/K540, Sport-Tek ST650, Carhartt Force, Nike Dri-FIT, and Cutter & Buck DryTec blanks. Standard left-chest logo plus optional right-chest name embroidery.
- [Welder Uniforms Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/welder-uniforms-las-vegas/): NFPA 2112 flame-resistant base layer (Bulwark Excel-FR ComforTouch SLU2, Carhartt FR Force) under leather welding jackets and sleeves (Black Stallion, Lincoln Electric). Embroidered with Nomex aramid thread to preserve the FR rating.
- [Custom Safety Vests Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/custom-safety-vests-las-vegas/): ANSI/ISEA 107 Class 2 and Class 3 hi-vis vests from ML Kishigo, PIP, Radians, and Pyramex, decorated within the 72 sq inch non-retroreflective decoration limit so the certification stays valid.
- [Trade Show Apparel Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/trade-show-apparel-las-vegas/): Booth crew apparel for Vegas trade shows including World of Concrete, IBS, ConExpo, AHR Expo, AGC Annual, and SEMA. Matching embroidered polos for floor reps, distinct executive layer, branded heavyweight tees for setup crew.
- [DTF Printing Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/dtf-printing-las-vegas/): Direct-to-film transfer printing for full-color, photo-detail decoration on cotton, polyester, blends, and dark fabrics. No screen-setup fees per color, suited to small-batch runs and mixed garment programs.
- [Promo Products Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/promo-products-las-vegas/): Branded promotional products sourced from the SAGE wholesale catalog — drinkware, bags, tech accessories, writing instruments, awards, event SWAG. Decoration matched to substrate.
- [Custom Yeti Drinkware Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/custom-yeti-drinkware-las-vegas/): Laser-engraved Yeti Rambler tumblers, lowballs, mugs, bottles, and the Wine Tumbler. Permanent etched two-tone decoration that survives dishwashers and daily use.
- [Custom Lanyards Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/custom-lanyards-las-vegas/): Silk-screen, dye-sublimated, or woven lanyards for trade show attendees, conference staff, corporate ID, hospital staff, and school programs. Five widths, full hardware range, breakaway safety release available.
- [Custom Team Shirts Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/custom-team-shirts-las-vegas/): Team apparel for youth and adult sports, corporate event teams, charity walks, school groups, and family events. Cotton tees, performance polyester, mesh jerseys, raglans, hoodies — with optional names and numbers.

## Services

- [Custom Embroidery Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/services/embroidery-las-vegas/): In-house commercial embroidery on polos, work shirts, hi-vis vests, jackets, hoodies, caps, and bags. Pantone-matched thread, Nomex thread for FR garments, files held on server for matching reorders.
- [Screen Printing Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/services/screen-printing-las-vegas/): Multi-color screen printing on tees, hi-vis vests, hoodies, and workwear. Plastisol and water-based inks, PMS color matching.
- [Rush Orders Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/services/rush-orders-las-vegas/): Expedited turnaround on screen print, embroidery, and DTF when the deadline came up faster than the order did.

## Industries served

- [General Contractors Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/general-contractors-las-vegas/)
- [Electrical Contractors Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/electrical-contractors-las-vegas/): FR shirts, Class E hard hats, hi-vis for electricians.
- [Plumbing & HVAC Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/plumbing-hvac-las-vegas/)
- [Roofing & Solar Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/roofing-solar-las-vegas/)
- [Concrete & Masonry Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/concrete-masonry-las-vegas/)
- [Steel & Iron Workers Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/steel-iron-workers-las-vegas/)
- [Landscaping Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/landscaping-las-vegas/)
- [Oil, Gas & Mechanical Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/oil-gas-mechanical-las-vegas/)
- [Data Center Contractors Las Vegas](https://bighornthreads.com/industries/data-center-contractors-las-vegas/): Type II hard hats and crew apparel for Vegas hyperscaler buildouts.

## Brands stocked

- [Bulwark FR](https://bighornthreads.com/brands/bulwark-fr-custom-las-vegas/): Excel-FR ComforTouch dual NFPA 70E + 2112 FR shirts.
- [Carhartt](https://bighornthreads.com/brands/carhartt-custom-las-vegas/): Carhartt and Carhartt FR garments embroidered in-house.
- [ML Kishigo](https://bighornthreads.com/brands/ml-kishigo-hi-vis-las-vegas/): ANSI 107 Class 2 and Class 3 hi-vis vests, shirts, and jackets.
- [Port Authority Polos](https://bighornthreads.com/brands/port-authority-polos-las-vegas/): K500 Silk Touch and K540 Performance polo workhorses.
- [Red Kap](https://bighornthreads.com/brands/red-kap-work-shirts-las-vegas/): Industrial work shirts for trade fleets.

## Compliance reference

- [ANSI 107 Hi-Vis Guide](https://bighornthreads.com/safety-compliance/ansi-107-hi-vis-guide/): Class 2 vs Class 3, decoration area limits, retroreflective tape rules.
- [Nevada OSHA Heat Rules 2026](https://bighornthreads.com/safety-compliance/nevada-osha-heat-rules-2026/): How the new heat-illness regulation affects Vegas crew apparel programs.
- [NFPA 70E Embroidery Guide](https://bighornthreads.com/safety-compliance/nfpa-70e-embroidery-guide/): Decorating arc-rated FR garments without voiding the rating.

## Programs

- [Company Stores](https://bighornthreads.com/company-stores/): Private branded storefront for ongoing apparel programs. Approved garments, sizes, and decoration spec preloaded; per-employee allowances; reorders at the same per-piece pricing as the initial order.

## About and contact

- [About Bighorn Threads](https://bighornthreads.com/about/): Background on the company and how the apparel programs work.
- [Contact / Get a Quote](https://bighornthreads.com/contact/): Quote request form, phone, email.
- [Field Notes (Blog)](https://bighornthreads.com/blog/): Long-form buyer guides on workwear, decoration methods, compliance, and trade-specific apparel programs.
